title: New Hire First Week Checklist
content: All new hires complete Workday profile setup, tax forms, direct deposit, security awareness training, and a manager-led 30/60/90 day planning session during the first week.
tasks: Complete Workday profile, tax forms, and direct deposit by Monday afternoon.
Finish security awareness training before Wednesday standup.
Draft a 30/60/90 day plan with your manager by Friday.
meetings: New hire cohort orientation on Monday at 10:00.

title: Device, SSO, and Application Access
content: IT ships laptops before start date and provisions Okta, email, VPN, Slack, Jira, and GitHub access. Missing access should be filed through ServiceDesk with the manager copied.
tasks: Sign in to Okta and verify email, VPN, Slack, Jira, and GitHub access.
Open a ServiceDesk ticket for any missing application access.
Enroll the laptop in device management before accessing customer data.
meetings: IT setup office hours are available Tuesday and Thursday at 14:00.

title: Benefits and Payroll Enrollment
content: Medical, dental, vision, retirement, and commuter benefits must be selected within 30 days of start date. Payroll changes entered before Wednesday are reflected in the next pay cycle.
tasks: Review medical, dental, vision, retirement, and commuter benefit options.
Submit benefit elections within 30 days of your start date.
Confirm payroll and direct deposit details before Wednesday.
meetings: Benefits Q&A with People Ops every Tuesday at 10:00.

title: Office Badge, Building Access, and Desk Setup
content: Facilities issues permanent badges after identity verification. Temporary badges are available at reception, and hybrid employees can reserve hotel desks through Robin.
tasks: Bring government ID to reception for badge verification.
Reserve a hotel desk in Robin before visiting the office.
Request ergonomic equipment through the Facilities portal if needed.
